matcher.coveragePreview: surface areas and volumes: 3-d shapes grade 9 mathematics students cube surface area & volume cuboid surface area & volume right circular cylinder right circular cone sphere and hemisphere surface areas and volumes: 3-d shapes introduction to solid geometry topic: surface areas & volumes focus: cubes, cylinders, cones, spheres goal: master formulas & applications what we will learn today learning objectives for surface area and volume define surface area vs. volume clearly apply formulas for cubes, cylinders, cones solve real-world problems involving 3d solids what we already know (2d review) review of rectangle and circle area formulas area of rectangle = length × width area of circle = πr² perimeter vs. area distinction hook: the construction dilemma real-world application of surface area and volume scenario: building a rectangular tank problem 1: how much steel is needed? problem 2: how many liters of water will it hold? core concepts: definitions & terminology definitions of surface area and volume for solids total surface area: sum of all faces lateral/curved sa: side surfaces only volume: space occupied by the solid cube & cuboid: deriving the formulas formulas for cube an...
